Must-Visit Places

Discover iconic attractions, hidden viewpoints, and sacred sites across the Eastern Himalayas.

Filter by category

Top Attractions

A curated collection of the most captivating places across our destinations.

Religious

Durpin Monastery

Kalimpong

One of the largest monasteries in the region with panoramic views.

Viewpoint

Deolo Hill

Kalimpong

Highest point in Kalimpong offering 360-degree views.

Heritage

Morgan House

Kalimpong

Colonial-era heritage property with scenic gardens.

Nature

Rhododendron Forest

Pabong

Dense forest with blooming rhododendrons in spring.

Culture

Lepcha Heritage Museum

Pabong

Showcases the rich culture of the Lepcha tribe.

Unique

Lebong Racecourse

Lebong

The highest racecourse in the world.

Heritage

Happy Valley Tea Estate

Lebong

One of the oldest tea estates in Darjeeling.

Nature

Icche Gaon

Ramdhura

A scenic village known for its sunrise views.

Viewpoint

Teesta River Viewpoint

Ramdhura

Stunning views of the Teesta River winding through the valley.

Nature

Sumendu Lake

Mirik

A beautiful man-made lake with a walking path.

Religious

Bokar Monastery

Mirik

A serene Buddhist monastery overlooking the valley.

Nature

Lamahatta Lake

Lamahatta

A serene sacred lake surrounded by prayer flags.

Culture

Dhokrey Village

Lamahatta

A traditional village with panoramic mountain views.

Culture

Lepcha Cultural Center

Lepchajagat

Museum showcasing Lepcha traditions and artifacts.

Viewpoint

Sunrise Point

Lepchajagat

Famous for golden sunrise over Kanchenjunga.

Nature

Orchid Sanctuary

Chatakpur

Home to rare Himalayan orchids.

Viewpoint

Chatakpur Watchtower

Chatakpur

Best views of the surrounding peaks.

Nature

Neora Valley National Park

Samsing

Rich biodiversity with red pandas and clouded leopards.

Heritage

Samsing Tea Garden

Samsing

Picturesque tea garden with factory visits.

Viewpoint

Ahaldhara Viewpoint

Sittong

Panoramic views of the surrounding hills and valleys.

Nature

Orange Orchards

Sittong

Endless rows of orange trees during harvest season.

Nature

Rangeet River

Bijanbari

Crystal clear river with boulders and pools.

Heritage

Tea Gardens

Bijanbari

Rolling tea estates with factory visits.

Viewpoint

Ahaldhara Viewpoint

Ahaldhara

The main attraction with 360-degree views.

Nature

Namthing Pokhri

Ahaldhara

A seasonal lake known for sighting salamanders.

Nature

Pine Forest

Kolbong

Dense pine and dhupi forests.

Culture

Village Walk

Kolbong

Scenic walks through traditional villages.

Viewpoint

Kanchenjunga View

Kolakham

Close-up views of the world's third highest peak.

Nature

Changey Falls

Kolakham

A beautiful waterfall surrounded by forest.

Viewpoint

Triveni Viewpoint

Peshok

Confluence of Teesta and Rangeet rivers.

Heritage

Peshok Tea Garden

Peshok

Vast tea plantations with factory tours.

Nature

Rishi River

Rishikhola

Crystal clear river with boulders and camping spots.

Heritage

Samsing Tea Garden

Rishikhola

Picturesque tea gardens nearby.

Religious

Pemayangtse Monastery

Pelling

One of the oldest and most important monasteries in Sikkim.

Heritage

Rabdentse Ruins

Pelling

Ancient ruins of the second capital of Sikkim.

Nature

Khecheopalri Lake

Pelling

Sacred wish-fulfilling lake surrounded by forest.

Religious

Sangacholing Monastery

Pelling

One of the oldest monasteries in Sikkim with stunning views.
